2603.22978.title: JFTA-Bench: Evaluate LLM's Ability of Tracking and Analyzing Malfunctions Using Fault Trees
2603.22978.paper_summary: In the maintenance of complex systems, fault trees are used to locate problems and provide targeted solutions. To enable fault trees stored as images to be directly processed by large language models, which can assist in tracking and analyzing malfunctions, we propose a novel textual representation of fault trees. Building on it, we construct a benchmark for multi-turn dialogue systems that emphasizes robust interaction in complex environments, evaluating a model's ability to assist in malfunction localization, which contains $3130$ entries and $40.75$ turns per entry on average. We train an end-to-end model to generate vague information to reflect user behavior and introduce long-range rollback and recovery procedures to simulate user error scenarios, enabling assessment of a model's integrated capabilities in task tracking and error recovery, and Gemini 2.5 pro archives the best performance.
2603.22978.paper_summary_zh: 在複雜系統的維護中，故障樹用於定位問題並提供針對性的解決方案。為了使以圖像形式存儲的故障樹能夠被大型語言模型直接處理，這些模型可以協助追蹤和分析故障，我們提出了一種新穎的故障樹文本表示方法。在此基礎上，我們構建了一個多輪對話系統的基準，強調在複雜環境中的穩健互動，評估模型在故障定位中的能力，該基準包含 $3130$ 條目，平均每個條目有 $40.75$ 輪對話。我們訓練了一個端到端模型來生成模糊信息，以反映用戶行為，並引入長距離回滾和恢復程序以模擬用戶錯誤場景，使得能夠評估模型在任務追蹤和錯誤恢復方面的綜合能力，而 Gemini 2.5 pro 則達到了最佳性能。
2603.22978.author: Yuhui Wang et.al.
2603.22978.authors: Yuhui Wang, Zhixiong Yang, Ming Zhang, Shihan Dou, Zhiheng Xi, Enyu Zhou, Senjie Jin, Yujiong Shen, Dingwei Zhu, Yi Dong, Tao Gui, Qi Zhang, Xuanjing Huang
